nodes.title: Execute Strike
nodes.description: Given a character with sufficient stamina, when Strike action is executed on a target, then target takes damage (via CombatCalculator), executor loses StaminaCost stamina, executor gains KyndeGenerated Kynde, and target takes BreakDamage to break gauge.

nodes.title: Execute Rest
nodes.description: Given a character's turn, when Rest action is executed, then executor restores 20 stamina via RestoreStamina(), removes 1 hunger stack via RemoveHungerStack(), and costs 0 stamina.

nodes.title: Execute Heal
nodes.description: Given a character with a Heal action, when executed on a target (or self if no target), then target heals by ActionData.Damage amount and one hunger stack is removed.

nodes.title: Execute Ranged Strike
nodes.description: Given a character with a RangedStrike action, when executed on a target, then target takes damage identical to Strike path (deferred hit if Animator present), executor loses stamina, break damage applied.

nodes.title: Execute Escapade
nodes.description: Given a character with sufficient stamina, when Escapade action is executed, then the TurnManager enters RealTimeWindow state with SuccessWindow duration for dodge.

nodes.title: Execute Ward
nodes.description: Given a character with sufficient stamina, when Ward action is executed, then the TurnManager enters RealTimeWindow state with SuccessWindow duration for parry.

nodes.title: Execute Counter
nodes.description: Given a counter window is active after successful parry, when Counter action is executed, then target takes 1.5x calculated damage.

nodes.title: Action Stamina Gate
nodes.description: Given a character with current stamina less than an action's StaminaCost, when CanExecute() is checked, then it returns false and the action does not execute.

nodes.title: Action Kynde Gate
nodes.description: Given a character with current Kynde less than an action's KyndeCost, when the action is executed, then ConsumeKynde returns false and the action does not proceed.

nodes.title: Action Kynde Generation
nodes.description: Given a Strike action with KyndeGenerated > 0, when the action is executed, then the executor gains KyndeGenerated amount of Kynde via GainKynde().

nodes.title: Deferred Hit Animation
nodes.description: Given a character with an Animator component, when a Strike/Counter/RangedStrike is executed, then WillDeferHitToAnimation() returns true, RegisterPendingHit stores the action and target, and OnAnimationHit() applies the hit and clears pending state.

nodes.title: Create Default Actions
nodes.description: Given a MedievalCharacter with no available actions, when DefaultCombatActions.AddDefaultsTo() is called, then AvailableActions contains Strike (15dmg, 15stam, 2kynde, 10break), Rest (0stam), Escapade (20stam), and Ward (25stam).

nodes.title: Action Cast Time
nodes.description: Given an action with CastTime > 0, when ExecuteAction is called, then ActionCastTimeRemaining is set and ProcessActionCast is deferred until the timer elapses.

nodes.title: Action Execution Time
nodes.description: Given an action with ExecutionTime > 0, when ProcessActionCast completes, then ActionExecutionTimeRemaining is set and ProcessActionExecution is deferred until the timer elapses.
